lines.speaker: Thirus
lines.text: If you're looking for dynamite, you've come to the right place, human.

lines.speaker: Thirus
lines.text: The name's Thirus Urkar. The Urkars have supplied the blast mines with the finest dynamite since they opened many ages ago.

lines.speaker: Thirus
lines.text: Now, can I help you today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy some dynamite.

lines.speaker: Thirus
lines.text: Sorry, human, I'm afraid you need more of a reputation in Lovakengj before I can sell you anything.

lines.speaker: Thirus
lines.text: There you go, [20/40/80] free dynamite. Return tomorrow for some more.

lines.speaker: Thirus
lines.text: I've already given you your free allowance for today. Come back to me tomorrow for some more.
